data.title: Kroger sold Vitacost.com to iHerb, focusing on its grocery operations. The transfer supports goal to streamline and enhance operations.
data.description: Kroger Company (NYSE: KR) recently announced the sale of its online wellness unit, Vitacost.com, to iHerb as part of its strategic decision to focus on grocery operations. The transaction was closed on January 8 after a thorough review of non-core business lines. The move is aimed at streamlining operations and improving customer experiences. Kroger plans to redirect capital towards food retail, supply chain improvements, and in-store investments. Ron Sargent, Kroger's chairman and CEO, highlighted the importance of the divestment in achieving these goals.

data.title: Tigé Boats' Ultré ZX wins 2025 Boat of the Year in Watersports from Boating Magazine, a prestigious honor.
data.description: In Abilene, Texas, on January 9, 2026, Tigé Boats revealed that the Ultré ZX has clinched the prestigious title of 2025 Boat of the Year in the Watersports division by Boating Magazine. This recognition stands as a significant achievement within the industry. The Ultré ZX was chosen for its exceptional features and performance, solidifying its position as a standout in the competitive watersports category.

data.title: La Mancha Resource Capital LLP notifies Endeavour Mining plc of its interests as of 8 Jan 2026.
data.description: Endeavour Mining plc has reported that La Mancha Resource Capital LLP disclosed its ownership of the Company on 8 January 2026.

data.title: Patriot Principles Project starts with billboards in N.C., focuses on immigration and Christian values.
data.description: In Wilmington and Winston-Salem, North Carolina, the Patriot Principles Project was officially inaugurated on January 9, 2026. This initiative focuses on safeguarding common principles and promoting policies that prioritize the well-being of all Americans. The launch of the Project marked the beginning of its mission to advocate for these principles.

data.title: Gifthealth opens new pharmacy in Mesa, Arizona, marking expansion into the Southwest. Celebrates milestone.
data.description: Gifthealth, a unified digital pharmacy platform, recently marked a major achievement with the inauguration of its advanced pharmacy in Mesa, Arizona on January 9, 2026. This new location signifies Gifthealth's venture into the Southwest region and showcases their commitment to growth and innovation in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Global smart home market expected to grow from USD 133.3 billion in 2023 to USD 1.03 trillion by 2035.
data.description: In Dublin, a report on the Smart Home Market has been recently released, now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The forecast predicts substantial growth in the global smart home market, expecting a rise from USD 133.3 billion in 2023 to an impressive USD 1.03 trillion by 2035. The report delves into various aspects such as the distribution by type of products, protocol, application, software & services, end-user, sales channel, and key geographical regions. This indicates a lucrative trend in the industry with significant opportunities for expansion and innovation.

data.title: Flo Health's Flo Period & Pregnancy Tracker app wins Google Play "Best of 2025" Award for Watches in Hong Kong, Taiwan, and Macau.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, in London, Flo Health, the creator of the widely-used Flo App and the top women's health app globally, revealed that the Flo Period & Pregnancy Tracker received the prestigious Google Play Best of 2025 Award. The app was recognized in the category of Best for Watches, solidifying its position as the number one women's health app worldwide.
